ddls:
CREATE TABLE "financial_instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial instrument */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the financial instrument (e.g., AAPL, TSLA) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the financial instrument */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of financial instrument (e.g., Stock, Bond, Derivative) */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the exchange where the instrument is traded */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sector of the instrument */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the industry of the instrument */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the financial instrument */,
  "issue_date" TEXT /* Date when the instrument was issued */,
  "maturity_date" TEXT /* Maturity date for bonds and derivatives */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the instrument */,
  "dividend_yield" REAL /* Dividend yield for stocks */,
  "coupon_rate" REAL /* Coupon rate for bonds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_instruments_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the exchange (e.g., NYSE, NASDAQ) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the exchange */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the exchange */,
  "operating_hours" TEXT /* Operating hours of the exchange */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* Website URL for more information */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Trader, Analyst, Admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Password hash for security */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., Active, Disabled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data entry */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the market data */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the instrument */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the instrument */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the instrument */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the instrument */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of trades for the instrument */,
  "market_cap" TEXT /* Market capitalization of the instrument */,
  "price_change" REAL /* Change in price from the previous day */,
  "price_change_percent" REAL /* Percentage change in price */,
  "average_price" REAL /* Average price for the day */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who executed the trade */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date of the trade */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the trade (e.g., Buy, Sell) */,
  "price" REAL /* Price at which the trade was executed */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the instrument traded */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the trade (e.g., Completed, Pending, Canceled) */,
  "commission" REAL /* Brokerage fee for the trade */,
  "order_type" TEXT /* Type of the trade order */,
  "executed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trade was executed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "watchlists" (
  "watchlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each watchlist */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the watchlist */,
  "watchlist_name" TEXT /* Name of the watchlist */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the watchlist */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Indicates if the watchlist is public */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("watchlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the alert */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of the alert (e.g., Price, Volume) */,
  "trigger_value" REAL /* Value that triggers the alert */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., Active, Triggered, Canceled) */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition for triggering the alert */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "backtests" (
  "backtest_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each backtest */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who ran the backtest */,
  "strategy_name" TEXT /* Name of the trading strategy */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the backtest */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the backtest */,
  "initial_capital" REAL /* Initial capital used for the backtest */,
  "final_capital" REAL /* Final capital after the backtest */,
  "return_rate" REAL /* Return rate of the backtest */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used for the backtest */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional comments on the backtest */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("backtest_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_backtests_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., Daily Summary, Monthly Performance) */,
  "generated_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report file */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Size of the report file */,
  "preview_url" TEXT /* URL for a preview of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access event */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time of the access event */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., Login, View Data, Execute Trade) */,
  "resource" TEXT /* Resource accessed (e.g., Market Data, Watchlist, Trade) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the device and browser used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
